blurb: The Financial Conduct Authority (FCA) regulates financial services firms and markets in the UK, including its work on the use of artificial intelligence in financial services.

publications.title: FS25/5: AI Live Testing
publications.summary: FCA feedback statement summarising responses to its April 2025 engagement paper proposing an AI Live Testing service to help firms safely deploy AI.

news.title: FCA helps firms to test AI safely
news.summary: FCA press release on supporting firms to test AI, following its September 2025 feedback statement on AI Live Testing.

news.title: FCA announces second cohort for AI Live Testing
news.summary: FCA press release announcing the second cohort of participants in its AI Live Testing programme.

notes: Regulator site. FS25/5 date 2025-09-09 from FCA page datePublished meta. Press release dates from page datePublished meta (2025-12-03 and 2026-04-21).
